Class SpaAssetHotUpdateService

Agibuild.Fulora

Signed package installer + activation/rollback orchestrator for SPA assets.

Creates a hot-update service rooted at the given state directory.

ActivateVersion(string)

Atomically activates a previously installed version.

Parameters

version string

GetActiveAssetDirectory()

Gets active asset directory path for SPA hosting integration. Returns null when no active version is selected.

public string? GetActiveAssetDirectory()

Returns

string

InstallSignedPackageAsync(Stream, string, byte[], RSA, CancellationToken)

Installs a signed package into the version store without activating it.

public Task<SpaAssetHotUpdateResult> InstallSignedPackageAsync(Stream packageStream, string version, byte[] signature, RSA publicKey, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

version string
signature byte[]
publicKey RSA
cancellationToken CancellationToken

Rollback()

Rolls back active version to the previous activation pointer.
